response:
module 1: identify the initial 24 residents interested in joining the workshop  
the initial number of residents is 24.  

module 2: calculate the number of prompts per group and total prompts  
each group has 6 participants and 3 prompts, so 6 × 3 = 18 prompts per group. with 4 groups, 4 × 18 = 72 initial prompts.  

module 3: allocate extra prompts to all groups  
10 extra prompts are shared equally among 4 groups, so 10 ÷ 4 = 2.5 prompts per group.  

module 4: calculate total writing prompts  
initial prompts: 72, extra prompts: 10, total: 72 + 10 = 82. library contains 82 prompts. library has 82 prompts. The END.
